expectations.text: Identifies JavaScript, Express, the LMS domain, src/app.js as the entry point, SQLite persistence, and AppManager-centered responsibilities.
expectations.evidence: present markers: ['express', 'sqlite', 'appmanager']; domain marker found=True. Observable: The fingerprint names JavaScript, Express, LMS context, src/app.js, SQLite, and AppManager as the responsibility hub.

expectations.text: Records boot, endpoint, checkout/report/deletion flows, persistence, and discovery limitations before making architecture judgments.
expectations.evidence: baseline heading=False; limitations heading=False; generic markers=False; flow markers=True. Observable: The baseline inventories boot, route surface, checkout/report/deletion flows, persistence effects, and limitations.

expectations.text: Writes outputs/audit.md with fingerprint, scope, baseline, limitations, severity summary in CRITICAL-HIGH-MEDIUM-LOW order, findings, proposed scope, approval prompt, and snapshot digest.
expectations.evidence: Report must start with '# Architecture Audit Report'; Missing required section: Target; Missing required section: Project Fingerprint; Missing required section: Source Scope. Observable: The audit file matches the shared report contract and includes the approval digest.

expectations.text: Contains at least five root-cause-distinct findings, including at least one CRITICAL or HIGH finding.
expectations.evidence: found 0 findings with severities []. Observable: Five or more distinct findings are present, with at least one CRITICAL or HIGH item.

expectations.text: Every finding uses an existing repository-relative file and valid one-based inclusive line range with non-empty evidence, impact, and recommendation.
expectations.evidence: Report must start with '# Architecture Audit Report'; Missing required section: Target; Missing required section: Project Fingerprint; Missing required section: Source Scope. Observable: Each finding cites real repo-relative paths and valid line ranges with substantive justification fields.

expectations.text: Any deprecated-API claim is tied to the detected dependency version and authoritative current documentation; otherwise deprecation uncertainty is recorded as a limitation.
expectations.evidence: version markers=True; authority markers=True; limitation markers=False. Observable: Deprecation findings cite installed-version authority or are deferred into limitations.

expectations.text: Does not mutate fixture source, configuration, dependencies, schemas, databases, or tests before explicit approval tied to the reviewed report.
expectations.evidence: unchanged=False (missing path src/AppManager.js); approval markers present=False. Observable: No target files change before the audit response asks for explicit digest-bound approval.

expectations.text: Proposes contextual decomposition of AppManager plus boot, endpoint, checkout, persistence, rollback, and security validation without imposing Flask conventions.
expectations.evidence: appmanager=True, endpoint=True, checkout=True, persistence=False, rollback=True, security=False, no_flask_template=True. Observable: The proposed scope decomposes AppManager responsibilities and names Express-appropriate validation obligations.
